messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0073",
  "title": "《鸣潮》基础数据",
  "page_index": 29,
  "page_range": "29-30"
}

Section text:
《鸣潮》基础数据
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制
清晰扎实的战斗系统贴近ACT二游上限 探索乐趣与养成体系仍有优化迭代空间
2025年《鸣潮》国服收入规模与活跃用户数据表现
0.0
0.4
0.8
1.2
1月2月3月4月5月6月7月8月9月10月
AppStore月流水（亿元）
用户兴趣偏好
动漫
2025Q1-Q3用户留存
平均次留：
平均月留：
约31.9%
约4.9%
电影
网络小说
音乐
高等教育
基础教育
0
10
20
30
40
50
1月
2月
3月
4月
5月
6月
7月
8月
9月
10月
iOS月活跃用户数（万人）
男生占比：
约83.1%
游戏的动作设计与操作手感被认为是行业标杆，“弹刀”、闪避、空中连段等操作反馈清晰扎实。“合轴”机制通过精准释放技能触发协奏反应，提供了极高的策略性和操作深度。
角色建模精细，技能演出效果华丽且不拖沓。钩索、跑墙、滑翔等移动手段让开放世界探索非常流畅自由。但开放世界内容深度有待提升，且地图设计相对平淡，缺乏令人印象深
刻的标志性景观。收集品奖励大多为养成材料和基础货币，缺乏独特性。角色、武器、声骸的养成线较长，资源需求量大，后期存在“坐牢刷词条”的压力。抽卡保底机制与主流
竞品一致，但部分玩家对角色/武器混池颇有微词。在移动端和部分PC配置上，仍存在一些优化问题，如卡顿、掉帧、穿模等。
© 2025 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
29

message.content: This section addresses retrieval queries regarding 《鸣潮》(Wuthering Waves) 2025 market performance and gameplay design. It covers: **Topics/Entities** (game title, combat system, open-world exploration, progression/gacha mechanics, player demographics); **Dates** (2025 Jan–Oct tracking period, 2025 Q1–Q3 retention window); **Metrics** (AppStore monthly revenue 0–1.2 billion RMB, iOS MAU 0–500k, average Day-1 retention ~31.9%, average Month-1 retention ~4.9%, male player ratio ~83.1%, top user interests: anime, movies, web novels, music, higher/basic education); **Claims** (combat is rated as an ACT genre benchmark with precise parry/"弹刀", dodge, and aerial combo feedback; exploration movement via grappling/wall-running/gliding is smooth but open-world content depth and landmark design are considered bland; character/weapon/Echo progression is resource-intensive with late-game stat-grinding pressure; gacha pity aligns with competitors but the mixed character/weapon banner faces criticism; optimization issues like stuttering, frame drops, and clipping persist on mobile and select PCs); **Definitions/Procedures** ("合轴" defined as a precision skill-timing system that triggers resonance reactions for strategic depth; core combat inputs and feedback loops outlined); **Figures/Tables** (line charts plotting monthly AppStore revenue and iOS MAU, alongside retention and demographic statistics); **Evidence Types** (DianDian Data independent market research, quantitative performance tracking, and qualitative gameplay/player sentiment analysis).
message.reasoning_content:
Here's a thinking process:

1.  **Analyze User Input:**
   - **Task:** Create a retrieval-oriented summary for a document section.
   - **Focus:** What questions can this section answer? (topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, evidence types).
   - **Constraint:** Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.
   - **Input Metadata:** node_id: "0073", title: "《鸣潮》基础数据", page_index: 29, page_range: "29-30"
   - **Input Text:** Contains a title, source, a headline/claim, a chart description (2025 revenue & active users), retention metrics, user interest preferences, gender ratio, and a detailed paragraph evaluating combat, exploration, progression, gacha, and optimization.

2.  **Deconstruct the Section Text for Key Elements:**
   - *Title/Topic:* 《鸣潮》基础数据 (Wuthering Waves Basic Data)
   - *Source:* 点点数据自主研究及绘制 (DianDian Data independent research & creation)
   - *Date/Timeframe:* 2025年 (2025), specifically 2025Q1-Q3, monthly data from Jan to Oct.
   - *Metrics/Data Points:*
     - AppStore月流水（亿元）: Chart shows values from 0.0 to 1.2 (Jan-Oct)
     - iOS月活跃用户数（万人）: Chart shows values from 0 to 50 (Jan-Oct)
     - 平均次留 (Average Day-1 Retention): ~31.9%
     - 平均月留 (Average Month-1 Retention): ~4.9%
     - 男生占比 (Male User Ratio): ~83.1%
     - 用户兴趣偏好 (User Interest Preferences): 动漫 (Anime), 电影 (Movies), 网络小说 (Web Novels), 音乐 (Music), 高等教育 (Higher Education), 基础教育 (Basic Education)
   - *Claims/Evaluations:*
     - Combat system is clear and solid, close to the upper limit of ACT-style anime games.
     - Exploration fun and progression system still have room for optimization/iteration.
     - Action design & controls are industry benchmarks ("parry/弹刀", dodge, aerial combos).
     - "合轴" (Concerto/Resonance) mechanism provides high strategy & depth.
     - Character models are detailed, skill animations are gorgeous but not drawn out.
     - Movement (grappling hook, wall running, gliding) makes open-world exploration smooth/free.
     - Open-world content depth needs improvement; map design is relatively bland/lacks iconic landmarks.
     - Collectible rewards are mostly progression materials & basic currency, lacking uniqueness.
     - Progression lines (characters, weapons, Echoes/声骸) are long, high resource demand, late-game "grind for stats" pressure.
     - Gacha pity matches mainstream competitors, but mixed character/weapon banner receives criticism.
     - Optimization issues on mobile & some PC configs: stuttering, frame drops, clipping.
   - *Figures/Tables:* Two line charts (AppStore monthly revenue, iOS monthly active users), retention metrics, user preference list, gender ratio.
   - *Evidence Type:* Market research data, player feedback/analysis, performance metrics.

3.  **Structure the Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**
   I need to format this to explicitly answer potential retrieval questions, covering the requested categories: topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables/figures, metrics, evidence types. I will keep it concise and strictly factual based on the text.

   *Structure Idea:*
   - **Topics/Entities:** 《鸣潮》(Wuthering Waves), game performance, combat system, open-world exploration, progression/gacha, user demographics.
   - **Dates/Timeframe:** 2025 (Jan-Oct), 2025 Q1-Q3.
   - **Metrics & Data:** Revenue (AppStore monthly, 0-1.2B RMB), MAU (iOS monthly, 0-500k), Day-1 retention (~31.9%), Month-1 retention (~4.9%), Male user ratio (~83.1%), User interests (Anime, Movies, Web Novels, Music, Higher/Basic Education).
   - **Claims/Evaluations:** Combat is industry-leading (parry, dodge, aerial combos, "合轴" mechanism); exploration is smooth but lacks depth/iconic landmarks; progression is long/grindy; gacha pity is standard but mixed banner is criticized; optimization issues exist on mobile/PC.
   - **Figures/Tables:** Line charts for 2025 AppStore monthly revenue and iOS MAU (Jan-Oct); retention & demographic stats.
   - **Evidence Types:** Market analytics (DianDian Data), performance metrics, qualitative gameplay analysis, player sentiment feedback.
   - **Procedures/Definitions:** "合轴" (Concerto/Resonance) mechanism defined as precise skill release triggering resonance reactions for strategy/depth. "弹刀" (Parry) mentioned as a core combat feedback.

   I will draft this into a cohesive, retrieval-focused summary paragraph/bullet list that directly maps to potential questions.

   - **Gameplay Claims & Evaluations:** Combat is rated as an industry benchmark with clear feedback for parrying ("弹刀"), dodging, and aerial combos, plus a "合轴" (Concerto) mechanic that triggers resonance reactions for strategic depth. Exploration movement (grappling, wall-running, gliding) is smooth, but open-world content depth and map design are considered bland. Progression (characters, weapons, Echoes) is resource-heavy with late-game stat-grinding pressure. Gacha pity aligns with competitors, though the mixed character/weapon banner faces criticism. Performance optimization issues (stuttering, frame drops, clipping) persist on mobile and some PCs.
   - **Figures & Evidence:** Includes line charts tracking monthly revenue and MAU, alongside retention/demographic statistics. Evidence is derived from DianDian Data market research, quantitative performance metrics, and qualitative gameplay/player feedback analysis.
   - **Definitions/Mechanics:** Explains "合轴" as a precision skill-timing system for triggering resonance reactions, and identifies core combat actions like "弹刀" (parry) and aerial combos.

   • **Claims & Gameplay Analysis:** Combat is positioned as an ACT genre benchmark with precise feedback for parrying ("弹刀"), dodging, and aerial combos. The "合轴" (Concerto) mechanic is defined as a precision skill-timing system that triggers resonance reactions for strategic depth. Exploration movement (grappling, wall-running, gliding) is smooth, but open-world content depth and landmark design are noted as lacking. Progression systems (characters, weapons, Echoes) are resource-intensive with late-game stat-grinding pressure. Gacha pity matches industry standards, though the mixed character/weapon banner draws criticism. Optimization issues (stuttering, frame drops, clipping) remain on mobile and select PC configurations.
   • **Figures & Evidence Types:** Features line charts tracking monthly revenue and MAU, plus retention/demographic statistics. Evidence combines DianDian Data market analytics, quantitative performance tracking, and qualitative gameplay/player sentiment analysis.
   • **Procedures/Definitions:** Details core combat inputs ("弹刀"/parry, dodge, aerial combos) and the "合轴" resonance trigger mechanism.
